query_normalized: predicting adsorption isotherm parameters from molecular features chemistry
rationale: The paper focuses on a software tool (GUI) for fitting isotherm models and simulating breakthrough curves using experimental data, rather than developing or evaluating methods to predict isotherm parameters directly from molecular features (e.g., using QSAR, machine learning, or quantum chemical descriptors).
